detectors.description:
Reentrancy in WhatIf._transfer(address,address,uint256) (WhatIf.sol#643-767):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (WhatIf.sol#707)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (WhatIf.sol#781-793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (WhatIf.sol#713)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (WhatIf.sol#801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (WhatIf.sol#765)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (WhatIf.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (WhatIf.sol#907)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (WhatIf.sol#909)
	WhatIf._rOwned (WhatIf.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- WhatIf._takeTeam(uint256) (WhatIf.sol#921-929)
	- WhatIf._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (WhatIf.sol#881-917)
	- WhatIf.balanceOf(address) (WhatIf.sol#469-473)
	- WhatIf.constructor() (WhatIf.sol#403-433)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (WhatIf.sol#765)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (WhatIf.sol#935)
	WhatIf._rTotal (WhatIf.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- WhatIf._getCurrentSupply() (WhatIf.sol#1077-1087)
	- WhatIf._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (WhatIf.sol#933-939)
	- WhatIf.constructor() (WhatIf.sol#403-433)
	- WhatIf.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (WhatIf.sol#565-587)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [WhatIf._transfer(address,address,uint256)](WhatIf.sol#L643-L767):
	External calls:

		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](WhatIf.sol#L801)

		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](WhatIf.sol#L907)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](WhatIf.sol#L909)
	[WhatIf._rOwned](WhatIf.sol#L319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [WhatIf._takeTeam(uint256)](WhatIf.sol#L921-L929)
	- [WhatIf._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](WhatIf.sol#L881-L917)
	- [WhatIf.balanceOf(address)](WhatIf.sol#L469-L473)
	- [WhatIf.constructor()](WhatIf.sol#L403-L433)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](WhatIf.sol#L765)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](WhatIf.sol#L935)
	[WhatIf._rTotal](WhatIf.sol#L331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [WhatIf._getCurrentSupply()](WhatIf.sol#L1077-L1087)
	- [WhatIf._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](WhatIf.sol#L933-L939)
	- [WhatIf.constructor()](WhatIf.sol#L403-L433)
	- [WhatIf.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](WhatIf.sol#L565-L587)
